comment: The noise cancellation is honestly the best part of these headphones. I use them on the metro every day and the cabin noise almost disappears. I noticed this during my morning commute. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. My main device was an Android phone.

Battery life has been excellent for me. I charge them maybe twice a week even with daily office use. I noticed this while working from a busy cafe. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I tested it mostly with a Windows laptop.

The sound is warm and detailed without feeling harsh. Podcasts, jazz, and movie soundtracks all sound clean. I noticed this on a weekend train ride. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. Most of my listening was through Spotify.

These are the first headphones that actually help me focus in a noisy shared workspace. I noticed this during back-to-back office calls. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I used it with Teams and YouTube on the same day.

The ear cups feel light and comfortable during long coding sessions. I can wear them for three or four hours without pressure. I noticed this while studying in the library. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. My room has a loud ceiling fan.

Multipoint pairing works better than I expected. Switching between my laptop and phone is almost seamless. I noticed this on a short domestic flight. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I usually keep ANC on the strongest setting.

The Sony Headphones app gives enough control without feeling too complicated. I noticed this while editing videos at night. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I used the default EQ for this impression.

Call quality is much clearer than my older headphones. My coworkers stopped asking me to repeat myself. I noticed this during a noisy family gathering. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I tried a custom EQ before writing this.

The design looks minimal and premium. I like that they do not scream gamer or studio gear. I noticed this while walking near traffic. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I used it with glasses on.

The quick attention mode is surprisingly useful when someone walks up to my desk. I noticed this during an online class. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I tested it without the carrying case nearby.

ANC plus low volume music is perfect for studying. It blocks the fan, traffic, and most hallway noise. I noticed this while pairing with my Windows laptop. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. Most listening was at low volume.

The case is slim enough to fit in my backpack, which matters because I travel with them a lot. I noticed this after switching from earbuds. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I used it during both calls and music playback.

LDAC sounds great with my Android phone. I can hear more detail in tracks I know well. I noticed this while listening to podcasts. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I paired it with two devices at once.

The touch controls are responsive once you get used to them. I noticed this during a long playlist session. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I used it in a quiet room first, then outside.

I bought these for flights and they made a six hour trip feel much less tiring. I noticed this after using them for two weeks. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I compared it with my older over-ear headphones.

The microphone is good enough for Zoom calls, and the background noise rejection surprised me. I noticed this after a month of daily use. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I kept adaptive sound control enabled.

I love how light they feel compared with older over-ear headphones. I noticed this while travelling with a backpack. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I turned off speak-to-chat after setup.
The auto pause when I remove them works reliably for me. I noticed this during gym warmups. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I used the black color version.

The bass is controlled and not muddy. It has weight without drowning the vocals. I noticed this while taking calls from home. I would still mention it to someone before they buy. I tried it with the included cable once.
